---
title: "About"
format: html
---

# About Me

I'm a Data Science and Economics student at Central European University, graduating in June 2026. I spent my third year at the London School of Economics studying Macroeconomics and Financial Mathematics.

My interests sit at the intersection of quantitative finance, macroeconomics, and data science. I've worked at Goldman Sachs (Equities Market Risk) and Raiffeisen Bank International, and I'm joining a macro-focused hedge fund in Abu Dhabi as an Investment Associate after graduation.

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, SQL, Stata
- **Statistics and ML:** Time series analysis, volatility modeling, econometrics, machine learning
- **Tools:** Bloomberg, Refinitiv, Excel, PowerBI, Git, Databricks, Google Analytics

## Education

**BSc Data Science and Economics** 
Central European University, Vienna (September 2022 to June 2026)

- Awards: CEU Tuition Awards (merit-based), CEU Alumni Scholarship (one of two bachelor's recipients)
- Thesis: Analyzing Duration and Convexity of EM vs G10 Bonds under Stress

**Study Abroad, Department of Mathematics** 
London School of Economics and Political Science (September 2024 to June 2025)

## Languages

English (full professional proficiency), Kyrgyz (native), Russian (bilingual)

## Contact

- **Email:** chorobek2004@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** [github.com/CaptaiNemo4](https://github.com/CaptaiNemo4)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/chorobeksheranov](https://linkedin.com/in/chorobeksheranov)
